designConstraints: Must use 8px spacing unit grid system with scale values [4, 8, 12, 16, 24, 32, 48, 64]px
Background must use background-primary token (deep-navy #0F172A) consistent with dashboard, add-expense, and spending-insights pages
Form sections and setting groups must use surface-primary (navy-surface #1E293B) cards with elevation level 1 shadow (0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3))
Input fields must use surface-input (deep-navy #0F172A) background with border-default (slate-border #334155) and border-focus (gold-amber #F59E0B) on focus
Primary CTA (Save/Done) must use cta-primary (gold-amber #F59E0B) background with text-on-cta (deep-navy #0F172A) text, matching app-wide button pattern
Typography must use DM Sans (display) for headings and DM Mono (body) for body/label text
Border radius must follow token scale: small=6px for inputs, medium=10px for cards, pill=9999px for chip-style selectors
Maximum 3 levels of visual hierarchy: page title → section heading → field label
Content max width of 1280px with 24px grid margin; single-column layout centered for settings form
Touch targets must meet minimum 44×44px for all interactive controls
TopBar shared component must be included for navigation consistency with other approved pages
NavigationTabs shared component must be included at bottom for consistent app navigation
Save/Done button navigates back to dashboard, consistent with navigation spec
Desktop-first layout at 1440px viewport with tablet support at 768px breakpoint
Focus ring must use cta-primary (gold-amber) with 2px width and 2px offset per state tokens
Disabled state opacity must be 0.38 per opacity scale tokens
Motion transitions must use normal duration (300ms) with default easing cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1)
referencePatterns: Settings drawer pattern from existing approved 'settings' screen — adapt drawer content into full-page layout
Card-based section grouping pattern from Dashboard BudgetSummaryCard for organizing profile vs. preferences sections
Chip selector pattern from Add Expense PaymentMethodChipRow for currency or locale preference selection
Full-width primary CTA button pattern from Add Expense SaveExpenseButton for the Save/Done action
TopBar with back navigation arrow pattern consistent across dashboard, add-expense, and spending-insights pages
NavigationTabs bottom bar pattern shared across all primary screens
Inline form field pattern with label above input from Add Expense NoteInput and AmountHeroInput
Section divider pattern using slate-border (#334155) horizontal rules between setting groups
Toast notification pattern for confirming settings saved, consistent with currency-updated toast referenced in API spec
accessibilityRequirements: WCAG 2.1 AA color contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 for all text — silver-text (#CBD5E1) on deep-navy (#0F172A) achieves approximately 10.9:1; gold-amber (#F59E0B) on deep-navy (#0F172A) achieves approximately 9.5:1
All form inputs must have visible, programmatically associated <label> elements with for/id linkage
Focus ring must be visible on all interactive elements using gold-amber (#F59E0B) 2px outline with 2px offset
Save/Done button must have descriptive aria-label indicating action and destination (e.g., 'Save settings and return to Dashboard')
Form sections must use <fieldset> and <legend> elements to group related settings for screen reader context
Error states on form fields must use coral-error (#F87171) border and inline error message with role='alert' for screen reader announcement
All interactive controls must meet minimum 44×44px touch target size
Page must have a logical heading hierarchy: h1 for page title, h2 for section headings, with no skipped levels
Keyboard navigation must follow logical tab order through all form fields and controls without trapping focus
Select/dropdown components for currency or locale must be keyboard operable with arrow key navigation and announce current selection via aria-selected
Success confirmation (toast) after saving must be announced via aria-live='polite' region
Color must not be the sole means of conveying information — error states must include icon and text in addition to red border
Sufficient spacing between interactive elements to prevent accidental activation on touch devices
dataModelDependencies: UserSettings entity — fields: id, currency, default_monthly_budget, locale, created_at, updated_at (from user-settings model, db_table: user_settings)
GET /api/settings endpoint — fetch current user settings for pre-filling profile and preferences form fields
PUT /api/settings endpoint — persist updated currency preference, default monthly budget, and locale on Save/Done action
Budget entity — default_monthly_budget field surfaced via UserSettings for editing the default monthly budget preference
Category entity — may be referenced for default category preference if profile settings include expense categorization defaults
